title: Bihai conferta
taxonomy: Bihai conferta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Panicum, which includes various species of grasses. Bihai conferta is native to East Asia and is often used as an ornamental plant in gardens and landscapes. The plant is known for its feathery plumes and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. It is a popular choice for erosion control and wildlife habitat creation in coastal areas.
